docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: PENELOPE PAHL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY MACHADO, LAUREN AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD (ALLEN DRYWALL) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACHADO, LAUREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLEN, RICHARD (ALLEN DRYWALL) DEFENDANT ALLEN DRYWALL-ASSOCIATES, INC SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $0.00. THE CASE AGAINST RICHARD ALLEN AS AN INDIVIDUAL IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
